/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/my_custom_interfaces/msg/detail/hardware_status__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib:/home/beeboss/Desktop/ros_workspaces/ros2_ws/build/my_custom_interfaces: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.7 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
